title: AcpAgentEntry
description: One entry in the `list_agents` reply array.

capabilities.description: Declarative capability tags advertised by the contribution.

connected.description:
`true` while a child process for this agent is alive in the
pool — the shell can render a green/grey status dot.

disabled.description: `true` if the adapter is registered but disabled.

metadata.description:
Opaque shell-only metadata round-tripped from contribution
time. Carries `plugin_id`, `display_name`, and any future
shell-only fields.
